2603.22362.title: Unveiling the Mechanism of Continuous Representation Full-Waveform Inversion: A Wave Based Neural Tangent Kernel Framework
2603.22362.paper_summary: Full-waveform inversion (FWI) estimates physical parameters in the wave equation from limited measurements and has been widely applied in geophysical exploration, medical imaging, and non-destructive testing. Conventional FWI methods are limited by their notorious sensitivity to the accuracy of the initial models. Recent progress in continuous representation FWI (CR-FWI) demonstrates that representing parameter models with a coordinate-based neural network, such as implicit neural representation (INR), can mitigate the dependence on initial models. However, its underlying mechanism remains unclear, and INR-based FWI shows slower high-frequency convergence. In this work, we investigate the general CR-FWI framework and develop a unified theoretical understanding by extending the neural tangent kernel (NTK) for FWI to establish a wave-based NTK framework. Unlike standard NTK, our analysis reveals that wave-based NTK is not constant, both at initialization and during training, due to the inherent nonlinearity of FWI. We further show that the eigenvalue decay behavior of the wave-based NTK can explain why CR-FWI alleviates the dependency on initial models and shows slower high-frequency convergence. Building on these insights, we propose several CR-FWI methods with tailored eigenvalue decay properties for FWI, including a novel hybrid representation combining INR and multi-resolution grid (termed IG-FWI) that achieves a more balanced trade-off between robustness and high-frequency convergence rate. Applications in geophysical exploration on Marmousi, 2D SEG/EAGE Salt and Overthrust, 2004 BP model, and the more realistic 2014 Chevron models show the superior performance of our proposed methods compared to conventional FWI and existing INR-based FWI methods.
2603.22362.paper_summary_zh: 全波形反演（FWI）從有限的測量中估計波方程的物理參數，並已廣泛應用於地球物理勘探、醫學成像和無損檢測。傳統的 FWI 方法受到對初始模型準確性敏感的限制。最近在連續表示 FWI（CR-FWI）方面的進展表明，使用基於坐標的神經網絡（如隱式神經表示，INR）來表示參數模型，可以減輕對初始模型的依賴。然而，其潛在機制仍不清楚，基於 INR 的 FWI 顯示出較慢的高頻收斂。在本研究中，我們探討一般的 CR-FWI 框架，並通過擴展 FWI 的神經切線核（NTK）來建立基於波的 NTK 框架，以發展統一的理論理解。與標準 NTK 不同，我們的分析揭示，基於波的 NTK 在初始化和訓練期間都不是恆定的，這是由於 FWI 的固有非線性。我們進一步展示，基於波的 NTK 的特徵值衰減行為可以解釋為何 CR-FWI 減輕了對初始模型的依賴並顯示出較慢的高頻收斂。在這些見解的基礎上，我們提出幾種具有量身定制的特徵值衰減特性的 CR-FWI 方法，包括一種新穎的混合表示，結合了 INR 和多解析度網格（稱為 IG-FWI），實現了穩健性和高頻收斂率之間的更平衡權衡。在 Marmousi、2D SEG/EAGE 鹽層和過推斷、2004 BP 模型以及更現實的 2014 Chevron 模型上的地球物理勘探應用顯示，我們提出的方法相比於傳統 FWI 和現有的基於 INR 的 FWI 方法表現出優越的性能。
2603.22362.author: Ruihua Chen et.al.
2603.22362.authors: Ruihua Chen, Yisi Luo, Bangyu Wu, Deyu Meng
